taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Frontend Software Engineer
core_skills: Scala, Java, Functional programming, Object-oriented programming, Design patterns
skill_match_scores: Scala:0.5, Java:1.0, Functional programming:0.0, Object-oriented programming:1.0, Design patterns:0.0
must_have_quals: Proficient in Scala or Java with solid foundation in object-oriented or functional programming, design patterns, algorithms, and system architecture, Experience in microservices architecture, messaging patterns, and deployment models, Experience in API design and building robust and extendable client/server contracts
preferred_quals: Proficient in Scala, Java, or Typescript, Experience with Kafka, RabbitMQ, Amazon SQS or similar data messaging platform, Experience building highly integrated, large-scale, high-volume, and testable systems, Experience with Kubernetes and containers technologies, Ability to mentor and coach other team members, A solid foundation in OOP, design patterns, algorithms, programming languages, networking and Linux operating systems, Expert understanding of web application internals and scalability at any tier, Proficiency in SQL, relational database schema design and ORM technologies & concepts, Strong understanding of deployment strategies and production infrastructure needs, Strong communication and leadership abilities
core_responsibilities: Contribute to our core services and data aggregation layer; meeting our need for scale, quality, and rapid iteration, Build out high quality integrations with other internal services leveraging Credit Karma’s rich financial data set, Work closely with our external partners to acquire new data to enrich our core user experience, Develop automation throughout our stack; through our build & deployment processes, testing, monitoring, data pipeline, and beyond, Work with front-end developers to complete end-to-end solutions and iterate rapidly as we experiment and learn, Willingness to learn new skills as our product and technology footprint grows
job_summary: Intuit is a mission-driven company focused on championing financial progress for over 140 million members globally. They are seeking a Backend Software Engineer to lead a growing team that impacts a platform handling millions of members' accounts, helping them navigate important financial decisions. The role involves contributing to core services, building integrations, and developing automation throughout the technology stack.
